audit_items.proof_trace: KZG multi-proof quotient polynomial computation (f(X) = Q(X)*Z(X) + R(X)) is implemented in external cryptographic libraries (github.com/ethereum/c-kzg-4844/v2 and github.com/crate-crypto/go-kzg-4844). Prysm wraps library calls in beacon-chain/blockchain/kzg/kzg.go but does not implement the polynomial arithmetic. Property concerns cryptographic correctness of external dependencies.
